name: 22" Elevated Orchid Plant - Threshold™
description:
Add effortless greenery to your interiors with this Elevated Orchid Plant from Threshold™. This artificial plant features white orchid flowers and green leaves with green succulents near the base for a gorgeous look. Housed in a footed ceramic pot with a fluted design, this faux plant is ideal for placement in your entryway, living room or a cozy reading nook.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
